name: Metal Bin Small Open Front Ivory - Brightroom™
description:
Add extra storage to your indoor space with this Open Front Small Metal Bin from Brightroom™. Made with metal in an ivory hue, this square storage bin features a spacious design with an open-front cutout to make it easy to stash away toys, blankets and more. Plus, the side cut-out handles on either side make it portable and easy to carry around the home. Suitable to place on any shelf or closet, this ivory metal bin mixes well with a variety of decor styles and color palettes.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
